texto: What is it about our specific belief in God and His wishes that makes us so angry at the specific beliefs of another? What is it about the teachings of our respective deities that makes us more right than the next person? Or more wrong?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Chuck Austen que provoca temas ligados a fe. Ao questionar “What is it about our specific belief in God and His wishes that makes us so angry at the specific…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre fe, religion, reflexao, com foco em reflexao.

texto: More people have died in the name of religion than have ever died of cancer. And we try to cure cancer... What makes us take up arms against those who pray to the same God with different words?
